text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! We're thrilled to have you on board as a Moderator. Feel free to introduce yourself and jump right in!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! We're excited to have you joining as an Event Helper. Looking forward to everything you'll bring to our events!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! We're so glad to have you here as a Mentor. Your guidance will mean a lot to our newer members!
